{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/253847613?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/davidalmeidac", "id": 253847613, "login": "davidalmeidac", "node_id": "U_kgDODyFoPQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/davidalmeidac", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45091", "cvss": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-200", "name": "Exposure of Sensitive Information to an Unauthorized Actor"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-522", "name": "Insufficiently Protected Credentials"}], "description": "In sealed-env enterprise mode, versions 0.1.0-alpha.1 through 0.1.0-alpha.3 embedded the operator's literal TOTP secret in the JWS payload of every minted unseal token. JWS payload is base64-encoded JSON, NOT encrypted. Any party who could observe a minted token (CI build logs, container env dumps, kubectl describe pod, Sentry/Rollbar stack traces, log aggregators) could decode the payload and extract the TOTP secret in plaintext.

An attacker with (a) the master key (e.g. from a separate compromise such as a leaked CI secret) and (b) any single leaked unseal token can use the extracted TOTP secret to mint new valid unseal tokens for any future deploy indefinitely, breaking the second-factor property the library claimed.

Patched in 0.1.0-alpha.4 by replacing the embedded secret with a salt-bound HMAC derivative (`enterprise_epoch = HMAC(totpSecret, salt || "epoch-v1")`). The TOTP secret never leaves the operator's machine in the new design. The wire format change is incompatible — files sealed by affected versions must be re-sealed and the TOTP secret rotated. Full migration playbook in CHANGELOG.md.

Reported by an external reviewer who decoded the payload of a real minted token and confirmed bit-for-bit equality with the operator's .env.local TOTP secret.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00326, "percentile": 0.24509}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x3r2-fj3r-g5mv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-12T15:09:08Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x3r2-fj3r-g5mv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x3r2-fj3r-g5mv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45091"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-12T14:17:08Z", "published_at": "2026-05-12T15:09:08Z", "references": ["https://github.com/davidalmeidac/sealed-env/security/advisories/GHSA-x3r2-fj3r-g5mv", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45091", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x3r2-fj3r-g5mv"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/davidalmeidac/sealed-env/security-advisories/GHSA-x3r2-fj3r-g5mv", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/davidalmeidac/sealed-env", "summary": "sealed-env: TOTP secret embedded in unseal token payload (enterprise mode)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T16:24:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x3r2-fj3r-g5mv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.1.0-alpha.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "sealed-env"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.1.0-alpha.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "0.1.0-alpha.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "io.github.davidalmeidac:sealed-env-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.1.0-alpha.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: sealed-env: TOTP secret embedded in unseal token payload (enterprise mode)
